title: anguina anamalayna
side_effects: Anguina anamalayna can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to stomach ulcers, nausea, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of the plant may also cause dizziness, confusion, and even seizures. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Anguina anamalayna for any health benefits to avoid these potentially life-threatening side effects.
